scripts.postinstall: prisma generate --schema=rms_backend/prisma/schema.prisma && cd rms_frontend && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm run build
scripts.start: node -e "require('dotenv').config()" && prisma db push --schema=rms_backend/prisma/schema.prisma --accept-data-loss && node rms_backend/prisma/seed.js && node serve.js
